emails.subject: FW: TW PNR Billing - December 2001
emails.body: FW: TW PNR Billing December 2001 TK, Do we have a plan to transfer all the PNR activity to the TW team for Feb 1? Thanks, Kim. To: Blair, Lynn; Cabrera, Reyna; Donoho, Lindy; Giambrone, Laura; Hanagriff, Richard; Harris, Steven; Hernandez, Bert; Kowalke, Terry; Lindberg, Lorraine; Lohman, TK; Lokay, Michelle; McConnell, Mark; McEvoy, Christine; Miller, Beverly; Minter, Tracy; Moore, Jan; Mulligan, Amy; Neville, Sue; Schoolcraft, Darrell; Threet, Kay; Ward, Linda; Watson, Kimberly; Y'barbo, Paul

emails.subject: RE: TW PNR Billing - December 2001
emails.body: RE: TW PNR Billing December 2001 I have put in a call to Lynn to ask about Bodnar's availability to TW. She and I will work on this. TK To: Lohman, TK

emails.subject: RE: TW PNR Billing - December 2001
emails.body: RE: TW PNR Billing December 2001 Yes, we now have a plan in place. Elizabeth will take over the posting of rates from Reyna and Mike Bodnar will continue billing TW's customers at least until June 2002. TK To: Lohman, TK
